scope_item: EXP-A8 — Phase A design refresh, Item 3 (accessibility audit + concrete fixes).
summary: EXP-213 drafted and saved. This is the FINAL Phase A draft (8 of 8) and a FOUNDATIONAL_MODEL_CHANGE under HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-001's hard hold. Do NOT integrate until operator posts HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN with approved_exp_ids containing 'EXP-213'. Draft is a WCAG 2.1 AA audit + concrete fixes. Findings: 92 .verdict-badge spans use inline-style hex colours (worst contrast 2.99:1, fails 4.5:1); pie-slice white labels fail on 4 of 6 slices; .tab-btn / .toc a / .win-anchor mobile tap targets are 23–38px (below 44px); zero :focus / :focus-visible rules anywhere; no skip-link or main landmark. Five fixes: (1) generate-html.js CSS block adding :focus-visible / .vt-glyph / .vb-glyph / .verdict-badge.vb-* / .skip-link / @media stacked-card-table / mobile tap-target rules; (2) formatPredictionDetail() template change replacing inline-style hex with vb-${verdict} class + glyph; (3) HTML structural skip-link + main landmark; (4) data/sections.json surgical replacements for two integrity-flagged hardcoded colours (#f5f5f5, #fff) and 14 inline-style kill-shot verdict-badges; (5) five test.js lockdown assertions. All var()-fallback patterned so integration order is non-strict. Six anticipated_objections drafted to honor operator preference 'think about the other side of the argument too'. With this draft Phase A is DRAFT-COMPLETE — all 8 of 8 EXPs (A1=EXP-202, A2=EXP-207, A3=EXP-208, A4=EXP-209, A5=EXP-210, A6=EXP-211, A7=EXP-212, A8=EXP-213) are awaiting one named approval HNOTE.
